message:
test(trace): Expand replay serialization + replayer coverage

Replay (149 lines changed):
- Fix unused variable warnings in existing tests (_bytes)
- empty_trace_serialization_roundtrip: empty trace survives encode/decode
- incompatible_version_rejected: version 999 triggers IncompatibleVersion
- trace_with_capacity_preallocates: with_capacity starts empty
- estimated_size_increases_with_events: monotonic size growth
- compact_region_id_roundtrip: CompactRegionId pack/unpack/to_region_id
- metadata_compatibility_flag: is_compatible for current vs old version
- io_error_roundtrip_all_known_kinds: all 18 ErrorKind values roundtrip
  through error_kind_to_u8/u8_to_error_kind

Replayer (195 lines added):
- Additional replay execution and state machine tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
